roi.footer: This section explains intended benefits. It is not a guarantee of time or money saved.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: TenderPilot helps you understand a tender fast so you can make a go/no-go decision with confidence. It structures RFPs and public tenders into review-ready outputs: mandatory requirements, evaluation criteria, risks and ambiguities, and a proposal outline.
howItWorks.disclaimer: Decision-support only. No legal or procurement advice. Always verify against the original tender document.
howItWorks.outputs_desc: A practical set of artifacts you can review quickly, built for traceability and verification.

sample.decision_text: No clear disqualifier detected, but two points need clarification: submission packaging and acceptance criteria for the support SLA.
actions_list: Confirm submission packaging rules (PDF set + signed declarations).
Clarify acceptance tests and deliverable sign-off process.
Validate ISO 27001 evidence requirements and acceptable alternatives.

mock.m1_desc: Submit through the e-procurement portal before the deadline. Technical and commercial offers as separate PDFs. File naming conventions apply.
mock.m2_desc: Include signed declarations (eligibility, non-collusion, confidentiality). Authority may request additional documentation during clarification.
mock.m3_desc: Tender requests evidence of security controls for processing personal data. Confirm whether ISO 27001 is strictly required or equivalence is accepted.
mock.r1_desc: Acceptance testing is referenced but pass/fail criteria and sign-off roles are not defined. Risk of scope creep and late disputes.
mock.r2_desc: Response times and service hours are unclear (business hours vs 24/7). Confirm escalation path, exclusions, and planned downtime handling.
mock.r3_title: Reference project template may be strict
mock.r3_desc: Annex suggests a fixed structure for references. Confirm if your format is accepted or if a template is mandatory.
key_bullets: Submission via portal; strict file naming rules.
ISO 27001 evidence requested for data processing.
Milestones exist but acceptance tests not defined.
questions: Can you confirm the exact submission packaging rules (file naming, number of files, signatures)?
What are the acceptance test criteria and who provides final sign-off?
Is ISO 27001 mandatory, or are equivalent certifications/controls acceptable?
mock.outline:
1. Executive summary
2. Understanding of scope
3. Proposed approach and methodology
4. Delivery plan and milestones
5. Team and references
6. Security and data protection
7. Service and support model (SLA)
8. Pricing
9. Compliance and declarations
mock.source:
1. Submission
Offers must be submitted through the Authority e-procurement portal no later than 12:00 CET on 14 May 2026...

construction.title: Live Construction Tenders (EU)
construction.subtitle: Browse active EU construction tenders (CPV 45000000). Track opportunities for road works, building renovation, and infrastructure in Germany, Italy, and Austria.

list.title: Autobahn A7 Road Maintenance & Resurfacing
list.desc: Large-scale road maintenance works including asphalt resurfacing and barrier replacement on the A7 section near Hamburg.

list.title: Renovation of Public School 'Leonardo da Vinci'
list.desc: Energy efficiency upgrades and structural seismic retrofitting for secondary school buildings in Milan.

list.title: Railway Tunnel Infrastructure Expansion
list.desc: Construction of new tunnel segments and track laying for the Koralmbahn expansion project.

list.title: Construction of New Hospital Wing (Lyon)
list.desc: General contractor services for the construction of a new pediatric wing, including HVAC and electrical systems.

list.title: Municipal Water Pipeline Replacement
list.desc: Excavation and replacement of underground water supply pipelines in the city center.

engineering.title: Live Engineering & Architectural Tenders
engineering.subtitle: Browse active Engineering and Architectural tenders (CPV 71000000). Find opportunities for civil engineering, design, and technical analysis in the EU.

list.title: Structural Engineering Services for Bridge Renovation
list.desc: Statics calculation, structural analysis, and safety inspection for the renovation of highway bridges (A9).

list.title: Architectural Design Competition: New City Library
list.desc: Architectural design services including urban planning and feasibility studies for the new sustainable library complex.

list.title: Technical Supervision & Project Management (Rail)
list.desc: Construction supervision and quality control management for the Koralm Tunnel expansion project.

list.title: HVAC and Electrical Engineering Services
list.desc: Consultative engineering services for energy efficiency upgrades (HVAC/Electrical) across campus buildings.

list.title: Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA)
list.desc: Provision of environmental engineering consultancy for cross-border sustainability projects.

software.title: Live Software Development Tenders
software.subtitle: Browse active EU software tenders (CPV 72200000) in Germany, Italy, and Austria. Use AI to analyze risks and write winning bids instantly.

list.title: Development of Specialized Software for Traffic Management
list.desc: Framework agreement for the agile development of traffic control center software (Java/Spring Boot).

list.title: Digital Transformation & Cloud Services (SaaS)
list.desc: Supply and maintenance of cloud-native application software for administrative processes. GDPR compliance mandatory.

list.title: IT Consulting and Software Engineering Services
list.desc: Provision of external IT specialists for SAP and custom web development projects.

list.title: AI & Data Analytics Platform Development
list.desc: Design and implementation of a data lake and AI analysis tools for environmental reporting.

list.title: Maintenance of Hospital Information Systems (HIS)
list.desc: Corrective and evolutionary maintenance of patient management software modules.

mustItems.title: MUST items
mustItems.subtitle: Hard requirements that can disqualify you.

risks.title: Top risks
risks.subtitle: Ambiguities that can impact delivery or cost.

tabContent.complianceDesc: Assign owners and track status. Blockers must be resolved before GO.
tabContent.bidroomDesc: Turn clarifications and checks into actionable tasks.
tabContent.exportsDesc: Share with stakeholders and proposal writers.
tabContent.sourceDesc: Evidence-first: always verify against the original document.

data.decisionLine: HOLD — Two blockers need clarification before bidding: acceptance testing and SLA penalties.

mustItems.title: Acceptance test criteria and sign-off timeline must be defined
mustItems.evidence: “The supplier shall pass acceptance tests according to Annex 4… Acceptance is confirmed by written sign-off.”

mustItems.title: SLA penalties and service credits must be capped or clarified
mustItems.evidence: “Service credits may be applied for each month below 99.5% availability… no maximum cap specified.”

mustItems.title: Proof of ISO 27001 (or equivalent) must be provided
mustItems.evidence: “The bidder shall provide evidence of an ISO 27001 certified ISMS or equivalent controls.”

mustItems.title: Named key personnel and CVs must be included in the offer
mustItems.evidence: “The bidder shall nominate key experts and include CVs (max 2 pages each).”

risks.title: Scope ambiguity around legacy system integration responsibilities
Unclear ownership of on-site support costs and travel
Bid bond wording may require legal review

questions.q: Can you confirm the acceptance test procedure and acceptance criteria (Annex 4) and the sign-off SLA?
questions.why: This is a blocker for delivery planning and commercial risk.

questions.q: Is there a monthly cap for service credits/penalties tied to SLA availability?
questions.why: Needed to quantify downside exposure and price correctly.

questions.q: Which integration interfaces are in scope, and who owns middleware changes?
questions.why: Clarifies delivery effort and timeline feasibility.

questions.q: Are on-site support days fixed or on-demand, and are travel costs reimbursable?

outline: 2. Compliance Matrix (MUST items with evidence and status)
5. Delivery approach, timeline, and key experts

bidRoom.title: Draft clarification email (acceptance tests + SLA penalties)
Legal review: SLA credits wording and bid bond clause
Technical scoping call: integration interfaces and responsibilities

exports: Tender brief (PDF) — decision, MUST items, risks, clarifications
Bid Pack (XLSX) — Compliance Matrix + risk register + task list
data.sourceExcerpt:
3.2 Service Levels

The supplier shall ensure an availability of 99.5% per calendar month.
Service credits may be applied for each month below the defined availability.

4.1 Acceptance

The supplier shall pass acceptance tests according to Annex 4. Acceptance is confirmed by written sign-off by the contracting authority.

hero.title: Simple pricing for tender teams
hero.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more volume. Paid tiers include a limited-time launch price.

ui.tipText: Upload a tender and get a decision cockpit in minutes.

free.name: Free
free.note: Exports are not included in Free.

pro.name: Pro
pro.note: Best for solo consultants and bid managers.

team.name: Team
team.note: Best for small teams with higher volume.

credits.title: What is a credit?
credits.text: One credit runs one tender review and generates the decision cockpit. Paid tiers include exports and more monthly credits.

items.a: Free is for evaluating the cockpit. Exports are available on paid tiers.

items.q: Can I delete my tender data?
items.a: Yes. You can delete jobs and uploaded files from your account.

items.q: How do you handle privacy and isolation?
items.a: Access is isolated per user and documents are served via signed links.

tenders.cardSubDefault: Search, filter, then open a tender for the decision cockpit.

onboarding.title: Welcome to TenderPilot
onboarding.body: Upload a tender to get a fast Go / Hold / No-Go recommendation, key risks, and an execution-ready Bid Room.
onboarding.cardEvidenceBody: Key claims link to supporting excerpts. Always verify in the original tender.
onboarding.cardTimeBody: Usually 1–3 minutes. Large files can take longer.
onboarding.workflow: Workflow: Upload → Decision cockpit → Bid Room tasks → Export

tenders.emptyBody: Try clearing filters, or upload a new tender to start.

tender.label: Tender
tender.notFound: Tender not found or not accessible.

bidroom.title: Bid Room
bidroom.globalSubtitle: Manage open work items across all tenders you can access.

compliance.title: Compliance matrix
compliance.notFinalBody: You can still set compliance status, but the requirement list may change until processing is complete.
compliance.noRows: No rows match your current filters.

drivers.hold: Decision drivers: mandatory requirements and submission rules that can disqualify you.
drivers.caution: Decision drivers: risks requiring validation before committing.
drivers.go: No mandatory blockers detected in eligibility and submission requirements.

review.exportsLocked: Exports are available on paid plans. Upgrade or top up to unlock exports.

account.playbookTriggerNote: If a playbook rule influences a decision, TenderPilot will show it as a trigger in the cockpit.

exports.body: Export from inside a tender to keep everything consistent with evidence.
exports.title: Exports

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.nameHelp: Shown on exports and (later) for teams.

bidRoom.title: Bid Room
bidRoom.subtitle: Track owners, status, and due dates.

playbook.title: Bid Playbook
playbook.subtitle: Rules that shape Go / Hold / No-Go. Not evidence.
playbook.modalSubtitle: These rules shape Go / Hold / No-Go. They are not used as evidence.
playbook.storageNotEnabled: Playbook storage is not enabled yet. Apply the migration and refresh.
playbook.oneSentenceHelp: Keep it short. This reduces generic noise.
playbook.oneSentenceFallback: Add one sentence about what you deliver
playbook.hardRulesPlaceholder:
No onsite work
ISO 27001 required
No fixed price contracts
playbook.triggerHint: If a rule influences the decision, it will appear as a playbook trigger in the cockpit.

billing.title: Billing
billing.creditsNotUpdatedBody: Your plan looks active, but your credit balance is 0. This usually means the Stripe webhook couldn’t grant monthly credits (missing DB schema or webhook not configured).
billing.stripeNote: Subscriptions and invoices are managed via Stripe.

dataPrivacy.title: Data & privacy
dataPrivacy.body: Tender files, extracted text, and results are stored in your workspace. You can delete individual tenders from the Tenders list, purge all tender data, or delete your entire account.
dataPrivacy.retentionBody: Deletions are immediate (best effort). If a file was already removed or a legacy table is missing, the operation will still complete.
dataPrivacy.confirmPurge:
Delete ALL tender data (uploads, extracted text, results, bid room items) from your workspace?

This cannot be undone.
dataPrivacy.confirmDelete:
Delete your account and ALL stored data?

This will remove tenders, results, and your profile. This cannot be undone.

notice.couldNotLoadSettings: Couldn’t load settings. Refresh and try again.
notice.paymentReceivedSyncHint: Payment received. If credits did not update yet, click Sync billing below.
notice.missingBillingSchema: Billing schema missing in Supabase. Run supabase/stripe_billing_v1.sql.
notice.couldNotStartCheckout: Couldn’t start checkout. Check Stripe env vars and try again.
notice.couldNotOpenPortal: Couldn’t open billing portal. Try upgrading first.
notice.couldNotDeleteTenderData: Couldn’t delete your tender data. Try again.
notice.couldNotDeleteAccount: Couldn’t delete your account. Try again.

overview.notesBody: Evidence IDs point to authoritative excerpts. Company context (if any) is not evidence.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: High-signal triage for decisions, deadlines, and execution.

kpi.aiExtractionHint: Deadline/decision from AI extraction unless overridden.
kpi.aiSuggestionHint: AI suggestion unless overridden by team decision.

queues.title: Operational queues
queues.subtitle: Actionable queues for daily delivery. Works even when the tender PDF has no deadline or decision.
